calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Continued To May-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:22am and concluding at 9:30am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing represented by Tiffanie Brown, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant BAA Gerneral Builder not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Custodian of Records for State Fund collections and witness for Plaintiff RICHARD CASILLAS and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant BAA Gerneral Builder, as follows:

Damages: $11,349.30
Prejudgment Interest: $3,906.16
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $972.69

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $16,228.15

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To Mar-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
